message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Application Layer" #LightGray
  participant ":SubscriptionController\n<<\u25C9>> <<@Controller>>" as C1
end box

box "Domain Model Layer" #WhiteSmoke
  participant ":SubscriptionServiceImpl\n<<\u25C9>> <<@Bean>>" as S1
end box

box "Infrastructure Layer" #Gainsboro
  participant ":JpaSubscriptionRepository\n<<\u25C9>> <<@Bean>>" as J1
  participant ":SubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository\n<<\u25C9>> <<@Repository>>" as P1
end box

participant "<<Actor>> User" as U1
database Datastore


activate U1 
U1 ->> C1 :  
deactivate U1 

note right of S1: via SubscriptionService
S1 --> J1 :  

note left of J1: via Spring data repository
P1 --x Datastore 


@enduml
